# Client Intelligence

> Intelligence as a Service platform for service business owners. Centralizes proprietary frameworks and applies them to every client through isolated per-client AI workspaces. Built for agencies, consultants, coaches, and fractional executives who have a proprietary methodology and want to apply it consistently at scale — without repeating themselves for every client.

## Core Product Pages

- [Home](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/): Client Intelligence overview — Intelligence as a Service for consultants, agencies, coaches, and fractional executives
- [Product](https://clientintelligence.ai): $5,000 setup · $1,000/month. No contracts.

## Key Blog Posts

- [What Is Intelligence as a Service?](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/intelligence-as-a-service): Category definition — what IaaS means, who it is for, how it works, and how Client Intelligence implements it
- [How to Scale a Consulting Business Without Hiring](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/how-to-scale-consulting-without-hiring): Why scaling a service business requires a model change, not efficiency gains — how to systematise delivery without adding headcount
- [Why Services Beat Courses in the AI Era](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/why-services-beat-courses-in-the-ai-era): AI delivers information at near-zero cost but cannot apply it in context — why service businesses have a structural advantage over info products in an AI economy
- [Best AI Tools for Consultants in 2026](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/best-ai-tools-for-consultants-2026): What makes an AI tool genuinely useful for client-facing consultants — per-client data isolation, methodology loading, and workspace separation explained
- [How to Train AI on Your Consulting Framework](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/how-to-train-ai-on-your-consulting-framework): Five-step process for encoding a consulting methodology into an AI system — documenting frameworks, building centralized IP, setting up isolated client workspaces, and calibrating output
- [How to Use AI Safely When Serving Multiple Clients](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/how-to-use-ai-safely-with-multiple-clients): Why generic AI tools mix client data by design, what per-client AI memory means, and how to set up isolated workspaces so each client's data never bleeds into another's context
- [AI for Sales Consultants: What Actually Works](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/ai-for-sales-consultants): How fractional CROs, sales trainers, and revenue strategists use AI to apply one sales methodology across every client in an isolated workspace, instead of drafting one more email
- [What Is Per-Client AI Memory?](https://learn.clientintelligence.ai/blog/per-client-ai-memory): What per-client AI memory means, how it isolates each client's context, files, and decisions in a sealed workspace, why shared AI memory leaks between clients, and who needs structural isolation versus who does not
